personal.name: Mainak
personal.title: Dasgupta
personal.tagline: Building scalable systems and intelligent solutions
personal.bio:
I’m Mainak Dasgupta, a passionate and detail-oriented Software Developer who thrives on solving complex challenges through intelligent, efficient, and well-structured code. With a solid foundation in C/C++, Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, and the MERN Stack, I specialize in building scalable, high-performance applications that merge technical precision with exceptional user experience.

My work spans across diverse domains — from developing an advanced Chakma OCR System that recognizes and translates one of the world’s rarest scripts, to designing real-time chat applications and robust e-commerce platforms that deliver smooth, secure, and interactive digital experiences. Each project I take on is crafted with attention to performance, reliability, and clean design principles.

I bring a strong command over problem-solving, algorithmic logic, and system design, enabling me to transform ideas into real-world, production-ready solutions. Whether it’s optimizing backend systems, enhancing UI responsiveness, or architecting full-stack applications, I aim to build technology that’s intelligent, impactful, and built to last.

sectionSubtitles.about: Passionate developer building scalable systems and intelligent solutions
sectionSubtitles.achievements: Recognition and milestones that define excellence

highlights: Engineered a Python + Pollar data synthesis pipeline to generate large-scale OCR datasets for the Dhama language, achieving 6 distinct model scales (3m-56m+ parameters) on Linux and macOS.
Utilized Jinja2 templates & Indic font libraries to create 300k+ synthetic training images with automated workflows with Git, shell scripting, and Python environments.

The 'ONGC Gas Production Visual Analytics Dashboard' is a Python tool developed to transform data extraction and reservoir pressure analysis for over 100+ wells, interactive visuals, aiming Streamlit for UI, Plotly for charts, Tkinter for the interface, Pandas for data processing, and Matplotlib for charting.
The 'Data Acquisition Tool for Perforation and Object Testing' projects is a Python-based tool built to automate the extraction and analysis of technical well reports from Word documents.

The primary objective is to replace error-prone manual analysis with an efficient, data-driven approach that leverages Python docx library for parsing documents and integrates a Hugging Face transformers AI model (BART) to generate concise summaries of complex textual content.

projects.name: FOREVER
projects.description: FOREVER — a complete, production-ready MERN stack e-commerce platform providing end-to-end shopping experience with admin controls, secure payments, and order management.
highlights: Full MERN implementation with RESTful APIs for products, users, carts, and orders
User authentication and authorization with JWT and protected routes; role-based admin panel for product & order management
Integrated Stripe for secure payment processing and order checkout flow
Product image upload and management via Cloudinary; optimized image delivery for performance
Advanced product features: category filters, search, pagination, reviews & ratings, and inventory management
Order lifecycle with status updates (placed, processed, shipped, delivered) and user order history
Responsive, accessible React frontend with optimized client-side state management and lazy loading
Deployed using Vercel (frontend) and Render/Heroku (backend) with MongoDB Atlas for production DB and CI/CD pipeline

projects.name: QuickChat
projects.description: Developed a feature-rich, real-time chat application (QuickChat) with one-to-one and group communication functionality.
highlights: Implemented Socket.IO-driven instant communication using Socket.IO for instant message delivery and live typing indicators
Designed a responsive frontend with ReactJS, ensuring smooth UX across devices
Built the backend with Node.js and Express, providing robust APIs for scalable message and user data storage
Implemented chat persistence so users can retrieve past conversations anytime
Deployed on Vercel with persistent chat history and scalable architecture for smooth user experience

projects.name: Amazon Clone
projects.description: Designed and developed a fully functional Amazon-like e-commerce website using HTML, CSS, and Vanilla JavaScript.
highlights: Implemented a shopping cart feature, allowing users to add, view, and remove products, while maintaining product state and storage using JavaScript
Gained hands-on experience with basic JavaScript fundamentals to handle DOM manipulation, event handling and local storage for persistent user data
Learned testing and debugging techniques using JASMINE to ensure the website's functionality and performance

projects.name: Tournament Manager
projects.description: A simple React application for creating and managing small tournaments locally — ideal for quick bracket setup and score tracking without a backend.
highlights: Built as a lightweight React SPA to create tournaments, add teams, and record match results
Used local component state and LocalStorage for persistence (no backend required)
Implemented simple bracket and leaderboard views with responsive layout
Focused on clean, minimal UI for quick setup and ease of use
Deployed as a static site for fast, zero-maintenance hosting

projects.name: YouTube Clone
projects.description: A simple, static front-end recreation of YouTube's layout using only HTML and CSS — built to practice responsive layout and UI composition.
highlights: Recreated YouTube-like responsive layout using semantic HTML and modern CSS (Flexbox & Grid)
Implemented responsive video cards, navigation, and search UI purely with CSS (no API or backend)
Focused on pixel-perfect layout, accessibility-friendly markup, and mobile-first responsiveness
Optimized the static design for fast load times and easy reuse as a UI template
Perfect for showcasing front-end craftsmanship and CSS skills on portfolios

achievements.title: LeetCode Top Performer
achievements.description: Solved 400+ problems out of 91,599 in LeetCode Weekly Contest 450, demonstrating strong problem-solving skills

achievements.title: Top 4 Percentile - JEE Main 2022
achievements.description: Ranked among the top 4 percentile students in JEE Main 2022, among approximately 9.3 million candidates

achievements.title: Silver Medalist - IMO
achievements.description: International Mathematics Olympiad (IMO), State Level, ranked among top performers in mathematics and logical reasoning

testimonials.name: Dr. Priya Sharma
testimonials.quote: Mainak's ability to build scalable data pipelines is exceptional. His OCR synthesis system for regional languages showcased both technical excellence and creative problem-solving. A dedicated professional who consistently delivers high-quality work.

testimonials.name: Rajesh Kumar
testimonials.quote: Working with Mainak was a seamless experience. His visual analytics dashboard transformed how we analyze reservoir pressure data across hundreds of wells. The tool's intuitive interface and powerful insights have become indispensable for our team.

testimonials.name: Prof. Ananya Chatterjee
testimonials.quote: Mainak stands out for his strong foundation in algorithms and data structures, combined with practical application skills. His projects demonstrate a rare blend of theoretical knowledge and hands-on implementation expertise.
